turns.speaker: persona
turns.text: Hi! I'm the Manish Corporation sales assistant. What can I help you with today?

turns.speaker: end_user
turns.text: I'm looking at the Pro plan — what's included?

turns.speaker: persona
turns.text: The Pro plan includes unlimited seats, priority support, and advanced analytics.

turns.speaker: end_user
turns.text: How does pricing scale for teams over 50?

turns.speaker: persona
turns.text: For 50+ seats we move to volume pricing — I can put you in touch with our sales team.

turns.speaker: persona
turns.text: Asmit Labs support here — how can I help?

turns.speaker: end_user
turns.text: My dashboard isn't loading.

turns.speaker: persona
turns.text: Let's try a hard refresh first. Are you on the latest browser version?

turns.speaker: end_user
turns.text: Just updated — it works now, thanks.

turns.speaker: persona
turns.text: Hi, ask me anything about Manish Corporation products.

turns.speaker: end_user
turns.text: What is the refund window?

turns.speaker: persona
turns.text: Refunds are available within 30 days of purchase, no questions asked.

turns.speaker: persona
turns.text: Welcome to Mohan Workflows Pvt Ltd — how may I assist?

turns.speaker: end_user
turns.text: I need to reschedule my appointment.

turns.speaker: persona
turns.text: Of course. What date works best for you?

turns.speaker: end_user
turns.text: Next Tuesday afternoon.

turns.speaker: persona
turns.text: Booked for Tuesday at 2:00 PM. You'll get a confirmation email shortly.

turns.speaker: persona
turns.text: Asmit Labs support, back again.

turns.speaker: end_user
turns.text: The fix worked earlier, but it's slow again.

turns.speaker: persona
turns.text: Let me open a ticket and have an engineer look into the latency.

turns.speaker: persona
turns.text: Hi! I'm the Manish Corporation sales assistant.

turns.speaker: end_user
turns.text: Do you offer a free trial?

turns.speaker: persona
turns.text: Yes — a 14-day free trial with no card required.

turns.speaker: persona
turns.text: Welcome to Jay Marketing Agency — what are you shopping for today?

turns.speaker: end_user
turns.text: Looking for the new arc reactor charger.

turns.speaker: persona
turns.text: Great choice. It's in aisle 3 — want me to check stock at your local store?

turns.speaker: persona
turns.text: Support Bot here.

turns.speaker: end_user
turns.text: How do I export my data?

turns.speaker: persona
turns.text: Head to Settings → Export and choose CSV or JSON.

turns.speaker: persona
turns.text: Hi, I'm the Aman BugFree Solution triage assistant — what bug are you seeing?

turns.speaker: end_user
turns.text: The export button throws a 500 on large reports.

turns.speaker: persona
turns.text: Got it — logging that as high severity and routing to an engineer now.

turns.speaker: persona
turns.text: Welcome to the Arora Travels trip desk — how can I help?

turns.speaker: end_user
turns.text: I need to move my flight to a day earlier.

turns.speaker: persona
turns.text: Sure — checking fare rules on your booking now, one moment.

turns.speaker: end_user
turns.text: Thanks, no rush.

turns.speaker: persona
turns.text: Done — you're rebooked a day earlier, no change fee. Confirmation is on its way.
